intent: Make the fidelity_attested provenance grade EARNABLE not merely assertable — a named real person must attest, bound by hash, independent of the reproduction agent, verdict=faithful. Closes the same assert-without-backing gap the wedge had with unverified evidence.

Review.note: 3-lens self-review: consistency (seal/canonical-json/import patterns match core), completeness (source/sample/attestation/grade/downgrade all covered), correctness (independence enforced, binding checked, faithful-only upgrade, fidelity_attested stays non-utility)

Implement.integration: core/helix_adoption_trial.py (provenance carries sample/attestation binding; aggregate_adoption verifies + downgrades unbacked fidelity_attested claims)

Verify.result: 663 tests OK (642 -> 663); helix_validate PASS (determinism gate includes helix_fidelity.py)

invariants_held: fidelity_attested is NOT utility — is_t4_utility stays gated by real_owned_stakes only
attester must differ from reproduction agent (no self-attestation)
unbacked fidelity_attested claim downgraded to simulated_unverified at aggregate, recorded not hidden
conflict_of_interest (e.g. wedge author dogfooding) recorded verbatim
trial cannot upgrade its own grade — upgrade is a function of an external attestation
ceiling: This layer reaches fidelity_attested (authenticity of a faithfully-reproduced real perspective). real_owned_stakes (genuine T4 utility) still requires an independent party running the wedge on real work with owned outcomes — out of autonomous scope; the slot is left explicitly empty, not faked.

first_real_receipt.flow: real source (CLAUDE.md/HANDOFF.md/DESIGN sha256) -> isolated subagent reproduced JWY perspective (non-deterministic, judged wedge 'conditional', not rubber-stamp) -> JWY (real person) attested 'faithful' -> grade EARNED, not asserted
first_real_receipt.conflict_of_interest: attester is the wedge author (dogfooding) — recorded, not hidden
first_real_receipt.unforgeability_proven: same receipt WITHOUT the attestation downgrades to simulated_unverified at aggregate

next: USER-DECISION: (a) commit the fidelity layer + first real receipt, (b) reach for real_owned_stakes (an independent party runs the wedge on real work), (c) other
